top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(lapTimes.milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId 
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId 
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy';

SELECT AVG(lapTimes.milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId 
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId 
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy';

SELECT AVG(lapTimes.milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId 
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId 
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy';

SELECT AVG(milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
WHERE raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE circuitId IN (
        SELECT circuitId 
        FROM circuits 
        WHERE country = 'Italy'
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(lapTimes.milliseconds) 
FROM lapTimes 
JOIN races ON lapTimes.raceId = races.raceId 
JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId 
WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy';
